title: Surat, Gujarat — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Surat, Gujarat: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Surat is a city in Gujarat with a population of 6,100,000. The diamond cutting and polishing capital of the world, also a major textile hub with a rapidly growing economy and infrastructure.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
